summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Interview Practice Platform. All major authentication, navigation, and core functionality flows are working correctly.

minor_ui_issues.issue: Session appears to timeout during extended navigation testing, requiring re-login
minor_ui_issues.impact: Users may need to re-login during extended usage sessions

missing_features.issue: Theme toggle button not easily identifiable through data-testid attribute

passed_tests: Login flow works and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard displays correctly with stats cards and interview options
Profile editing functionality works (name field editable, save button enables)
Logout functionality works and redirects to landing page
Session persistence works for direct page access after login
Role-based interview setup page loads and displays role options
